basic_details.job_title: RRI Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Raman Research Institute (RRI) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 2 Research Assistant (RA) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 26 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per Govt. of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/PWD categories.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. (Physics / Photonics / Optoelectronics / Related fields) or B.E. /B.Tech / M.Tech (Engineering Physics / Electronics / Related fields) with a minimum of 60% marks or equivalent.
qualification.details: M.Sc. (Physics / Photonics / Optoelectronics / Related fields) or B.E. /B.Tech / M.Tech (Engineering Physics / Electronics / Related fields) with a minimum of 60% marks or equivalent.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RRI Research Assistant (RA) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RRI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RRI Research Assistant (RA) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the RRI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RRI Research Assistant (RA) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RRI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RRI Research Assistant (RA) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RRI Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the RRI Research Assistant (RA) posts is 15th July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Physics, Photonics, Optoelectronics, or related fields, or a B.E./B.Tech/M.Tech degree in Engineering Physics, Electronics, or related fields, with at least 60% marks.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Research Assistant (RA) post at the Raman Research Institute (RRI).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Research Assistant position is 26 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 31,000 per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the official notification, there is no application fee for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the RRI Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Assistant posts will involve a Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for the RRI Research Assistant (RA) recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Raman Research Institute located?
faq.answer: The Raman Research Institute is located in Bengaluru, Karnataka, with the pincode 560080.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Research Assistant (RA) positions at Raman Research Institute are contractual in nature.
